global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and geometric shapes.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and energetic base.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'StarVault' in bold, modern typography, prominently displayed at the top center.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned towards the bottom left, adding a subtle design element.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: The text 'Exclusive tonight New hits every week' is bold and large, centered in the middle of the ad.
elements.text_content: Exclusive tonight New hits every week

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom center with the text 'Try for free' in a bold, easy-to-read font.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The text 'UGC' is displayed in a small font at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, features bold text and a call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by geometric shapes in the center, with the headline in the middle and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: StarVault, Exclusive tonight New hits every week, Try for free, UGC
